productDisplayName: Reebok Men Hanavi II Green Flip Flops
description: When the heart desires utmost style and comfort, you shouldn't deprive it of such pleasure! The reebok Hanavi 2 flip-flops offer a fantastic look coupled with unbelievable all-day comfort. If you want to look awesome and feel great, they are your best bet. Team them with jeans or shorts for a perfectly relaxed look. It was never easier to look spectacular, cool and so wow! UpperWide rubber straps in thong style for durability and comfortRubber toe separator for maximum comfort and durabilityBrand tab on strapMidsoleCushioned footbed for all-day comfortBranding on footbedOutsoleTPR outsole for better shock absorption and durabilityHorizontal grooves all over the outsole for better traction on all surfacesshoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, dry cloth to remove dustDo not machine washDo not store in direct sunlight
